## Apple Characterized as Defensive Play in AI-Driven Market

If the market rotates to reward defensiveness within AI — incumbents that adapt rather than lead — Apple's multiple could re-rate on a lower-risk premium; the contrarian risk is that 'defensive' re-rates lower if AI upstarts accelerate share capture.

- Commentary frames Apple as a defensive investment in the context of an AI-driven market environment.
- Thesis positions Apple's incumbent scale as insulation against AI-era disruption rather than a growth driver.
- Single outlet; medium confidence — this is an opinion framing, not a fundamental catalyst.
- No specific financial figure or product detail cited in the headline.
